mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( -- 根节点 SELECT m.* FROM menus m INNER JOIN role_menus rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.parent_id = 0 AND m.deleted = 0 AND rm.deleted = 0 AND ur.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
-- 递归子节点 SELECT m.* FROM menus m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.parent_id = mt.id WHERE m.deleted = 0 ) SELECT * FROM menu_tree ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC
